title: telanthera diffusa
intro: Telanthera diffusa, also known as Spilanthes acmella, is a tropical plant native to the Americas and Asia, commonly found in warm and humid climates. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Telanthera diffusa include relieving toothaches and gum inflammation, reducing fever, and treating digestive issues. Telanthera diffusa can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used as a mouthwash or applied topically as a poultice to treat various health problems.
